{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032207254939B7695DBB4C75B1C8AA"}"},"total":19},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615578077967811353","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这就是我想看的口牙！无底线，无道德乐子人，大小乐子都照干不误，而且也不是为了迎合大众口味把主角弄得有底线和善良，建议作者把封面桑博换成主角形象省得有些读者会拿本书主角做对比（毕竟桑博其实还挺不错的有底线）我特别喜欢这个主角，很可爱，纯乐子人，很多梗很搞笑，后面被精神污染行事比前文要极端，毕竟之前没有亲自嘎过无辜人。总之这本书在我书架已经归为宝藏那一类了，一定要继续写下去呀加油！（对了，还是建议在简介上写上那种无道德什么的避雷，因为大众还是偏爱那种比较有底线的，我怕作者大大被那种把小说三观带到现实里的人骂）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773142253,"group_id":"7606336284721679422","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小学生一枚～爱写爱玩的笨蛋中二病～是小安的挚友哒！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3uB00YRrWUEiF+GsSdRN7/OR2oiEaKwLLeVjkeNjx96","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6672c8ba8d5d43ea90015cc99c21eb71~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706246&x-signature=x%2BiKSC0Qvubdi2eT06D4wuylYOU%3D","user_id":"2927363491639616","user_name":"千稚久"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2927363491639616","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7606336284721679422","book_info":{"abstract":"(无敌+无女主(如果真要说的话王之右手？)+乐子人+乐子文+乐子系统+高武+异能+微群像+伪反派+出生+豆沙了(￣∇￣))
年仅18岁听闻国道上有漫展，还邀请他cosplay减速带的陆守谦，只因在漫展上与大运深情对视超过0.1秒，所以不幸被撞飞。
但好在，撞飞他的是大运，所以理所应当的他直接穿越，不过不是异世界。
不过，区区高武世界，在拥有乐子系统的乐子(？)面前就是一条区。
别人只需要变成乐子就好了，而陆守谦本人要考虑的就很多了。
被陆守谦坑过的人都知道再见到他，一定要小心谨慎，这是件好事，而陆守谦发现别人居然需要小心谨慎的对待他，那把他变成乐子，一定很有乐子，所以陆守谦一定会把他变成乐子，这是件坏事。
所以事情越好，事情越坏！̋(๑˃́ꇴ˂̀๑)
美味的乐子系统，只要别人变成乐子，那么陆守谦就能有神秘♂奖励。
陆守谦：“你失去的只是生命！！可我失去的是快乐口牙！！！”
以为一辈子就只能在找乐子中度过的陆守谦突然发现，……这气运之子是个什么玩意？
废话，当然是乐子！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/df1cbfc473dcffd6a70eb7e74d546291~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"高兴死了","author_id":"","book_id":"7606336284721679422","book_name":"我去！不早说，原来我是神人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#280818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":513,"name":"高武世界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=513&name=高武世界&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7606336440393286206","read_count":"13604","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"132964"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"50","tags":"都市高武,高武世界,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/df1cbfc473dcffd6a70eb7e74d546291~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779319549&x-signature=aGuNyuhQRCZDHas60ZMZT2yU2Ws%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1337438482480286","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"49"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032207254939B7695DBB4C75B1C8AA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3648,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":1475},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1773157525,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614323308025217854","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实开局挺好的，已经超越番
